title: Ratification of prior scholarships and stipends
doc_html:
§1004.  Ratification of prior scholarships and stipends

The programs of scholarships and stipends provided by state hospitals to students in nursing during the year 1950 and in prior years are hereby ratified and approved.  

Acts 1950, No. 392, §4.
